sections.paragraph:
Σκαριώθ the rdg. of D in Mk 3:19; J 6:71 (for Ἰσκαριώτου). S. next entry.

rdg. rdg. = reading(s)

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 926
